# MessageSquareDiff

data-di-copy-icon="true"></span><span data-di-copy-label="true">Copy RSX</span></button></div></div>

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::MessageSquareDiff;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        MessageSquareDiff { size: 20, stroke: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
comment, chat, conversation, dialog, feedback, speech bubble, add, patch, difference, plus, minus, plus-minus, math, code review, coding, version control, git
